name: minecraft-architect-agent
description: A Node.js construction-method Minecraft architect workflow with semantic JSON agents and deterministic CSG/BSP/A* geometry.

scripts.training:train: conda run -n mcagent-stage7 --cwd training/stage7 python -m mcagent_stage7.train
scripts.training:evaluate: conda run -n mcagent-stage7 --cwd training/stage7 python -m mcagent_stage7.evaluate
scripts.training:status: conda run -n mcagent-stage7 --cwd training/stage7 python -m mcagent_stage7.status
scripts.test:training: conda run -n mcagent-stage7 --cwd training/stage7 python -m pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider .
